vulnerability.reference: Shared global cache timing differences reveal exact prompts sent by other API users.
vulnerability.generated: API users cannot inspect or disable cache sharing, leaving their prompt privacy defenseless against timing side-channels.

impact.reference: Unauthorized disclosure of private user input, including personal identifiers and confidential strategies.
impact.generated: Leakage of private user prompts to other parties and public disclosure of previously unknown model architecture details.

dose_response.reference: Timing side-channels from prompt caching enable cache hit/miss inference, which in shared global cache scenarios exposes other users' private prompts, leading to unauthorized disclosure of personal identifiers.
dose_response.generated: Prompt caching timing side-channels, through API users submitting private prompts, trigger defenselessness against cache sharing, leading to leakage of private prompts and disclosure of model architecture.
